testimonials.description: Over 1M+ users trust Plane. Here's what some of them have to say.

items.name: Alex Drakonov
items.content: Hey @linear when will multiple assignees on the same ticket be a thing? An open source alternative (@planepowers) has this feature and it's super handy!

items.name: Sarah Wings
items.content: At this point everything I work on across multiple teams is going to use Plane, so I have now one way of thinking about the world.

items.name: Michael Chen
items.content: Thank you for creating great products that my team and I can't live without in my actual work.

items.name: Albert Rodriguez
items.content: Hello, Albert here. I am very impressed with the Free Cloud plan. Atlassian better be scared xd

items.name: Laura Martinez
items.content: I'm personally moving from Atlassian to Plane and the experience has been amazing.

items.name: Marcus Williams
items.content: Plane is hands down the best project in existence.

items.name: Niran Patel
items.content: Hi guys, I am new here. It's been a while using a self hosted plane to manage engineering projects. Already in love with the features and smooth UI. 🤩

items.name: Scott Thompson
items.content: Hello, Scott here! I'm moving to Plane from Linear, thank you so much for making Plane open source.

items.name: Elena Kowalski
items.content: Hi this app looks amazing! I just selfhosted it and it was so easy.

items.name: James Parker

items.name: Dr. Hannah Lee

testimonials.customersDescription: Real stories from companies that switched to Plane and never looked back.

customers.quote: The Plane team is creating a product that our business has been needing for years. Modern features, flexible workflows, without sacrificing reporting abilities.
customers.author: Duane Arnett

customers.quote: It feels like modern software and it works reliably. We don't need a dedicated admin, and we're not forcing simple boards to do jobs they can't do.
customers.author: Duane Arnett

customers.quote: It's a very safe environment for us to blindfold ourselves and say, okay, my PM cannot go wrong at the most common places.
customers.author: Ramprasath

customers.quote: Pages blew us away. Most tools miss this. The ability for the whole team to work live on the same doc, without silos, was a game-changer.
customers.author: Satyam Krishna

customers.quote: Our metric was simple: how quickly can we unblock each other? Plane makes it visible—who's stuck, at what stage, on which module.
customers.author: Satyam Krishna

customers.quote: Easy to configure, easy to use, especially when the number of work items increases. With Plane, we could finally bring everyone into the same system.
customers.author: Marc U.

customers.quote: We've been using Plane Pro, and we're still absolutely thrilled with it! Thank you so much for all your hard work, it's really appreciated.
customers.author: Marc Ungeschikts

customers.quote: Switching was easy, and the impact was immediate. Reports that took hours now take minutes. That alone made the move worth it.
customers.author: Max Kraszewski

customers.quote: We ship faster because everything flows through Plane. No spreadsheets, no lost threads, no wasted cycles.
customers.author: Mahesh Sagi

blog.title: Blog
blog.heroDesc: Insights, guides, and best practices on project management, Plane, and digital transformation.

posts.title: Why Migrate from Jira to Plane in 2025
posts.excerpt: Discover the key advantages of switching from Jira to Plane and how to make the transition seamless.
posts.author: PALANTIR-CODE
posts.content:
Many organizations are rethinking their project management tools in 2025. Jira, while powerful, has grown increasingly complex and expensive. Plane offers a modern, open-source alternative that combines simplicity with enterprise-grade features.

One of the biggest advantages of Plane is its intuitive interface. Teams can get started quickly without the steep learning curve that Jira is known for. The unified workspace brings together project tracking, documentation, and collaboration in one place.

Plane also offers flexible deployment options: cloud, self-hosted, or airgapped. This means your data stays where you want it, meeting even the strictest compliance requirements.

At PALANTIR-CODE, we've helped dozens of teams make the switch. Our migration process ensures zero data loss, complete field mapping, and comprehensive user training. The result? Teams that are more productive from day one.

posts.title: Plane Compose: Projects-as-Code Revolution
posts.excerpt: Learn how Plane Compose brings Git-style discipline to project management with version-controlled configurations.
posts.author: PALANTIR-CODE
posts.content:
Plane Compose introduces a groundbreaking concept: Projects-as-Code. Just as Infrastructure-as-Code transformed how we manage servers, Plane Compose transforms how we manage projects.

With Plane Compose, your project structure becomes a first-class artifact. Workflows, states, labels, and custom fields are defined in YAML, versioned in Git, and reviewed through pull requests.

The CLI makes it simple: 'plane init' scaffolds a new project, 'plane schema pull' syncs your configuration, and 'plane clone' replicates structures across workspaces.

This approach brings consistency across teams, reduces onboarding time, and enables DevOps teams to manage project infrastructure with the same rigor they apply to code. At PALANTIR-CODE, we help teams adopt Plane Compose and integrate it into their existing CI/CD pipelines.

posts.title: Project Management Best Practices for 2025
posts.excerpt: Stay ahead with the latest trends and best practices in project management for high-performing teams.
posts.author: PALANTIR-CODE
posts.content:
Project management is evolving rapidly. In 2025, the most successful teams are embracing new approaches that prioritize flexibility, transparency, and automation.

First, open-source tools are gaining traction. Organizations want transparency in their tools, not just their processes. Plane exemplifies this trend with its fully open-source codebase.

Second, AI-powered automation is becoming essential. From auto-assigning tasks to generating project insights, AI is helping teams focus on what matters most.

Third, unified workspaces are replacing fragmented toolchains. Instead of switching between project tracking, documentation, and communication tools, teams want everything in one place.

Finally, compliance and data sovereignty are top priorities. Self-hosted and airgapped deployment options ensure that sensitive project data stays within organizational boundaries.

At PALANTIR-CODE, we help organizations adopt these best practices with Plane as the foundation.

planeMCP.title: AI-Powered Project Management with
planeMCP.description: The Plane MCP Server lets AI agents interact with your projects through the Model Context Protocol. Create issues, manage sprints, and automate workflows — all from your favorite AI tools.
planeMCP.feature1Desc: Let AI assistants like Claude, Cursor, and Copilot manage your Plane workspace directly — create issues, update statuses, and query projects with natural language.
planeMCP.feature2Desc: Connect via HTTP with OAuth, PAT tokens for CI/CD pipelines, local Stdio for self-hosted instances, or legacy SSE — whatever fits your workflow.
planeMCP.feature3Desc: Browser-based OAuth for cloud users, API key authentication for automation, and full self-hosted support to keep your data within your infrastructure.
planeMCP.feature4Desc: Fully open source on GitHub. Extend, customize, and contribute to the Plane MCP Server to match your team's unique needs.

comparison.plane: Workspaces → Projects → Work Items — intuitive hierarchy
comparison.jira: Projects, schemes, screens, fields — easy to over-configure

comparison.plane: Built-in Pages/Wiki next to your projects
Native AI assist + lightweight rules included
comparison.jira: Powerful, but often needs paid add-ons/Marketplace

comparison.plane: Lower TCO, no unpredictable add-on costs
comparison.jira: Higher TCO, add-ons add up quickly at scale
